summary: Aayush is a final-year undergraduate studying accounting & finance, working part-time as a student ambassador / event host and living with parents in London. Primary apps: uses Uber Eats most (has Uber One), also has Deliveroo student subscription. Frequency: ordering has increased with schedule pressure — estimates ~2–3 orders per week. Main triggers: price/offers and convenience when tired/alone or social/lazy situations; taste and perceived value/quantity also matter. Uber One (5% credit back) creates loyalty — small price gaps (~£1) don't usually prompt switching; a price gap of ~£3–4 would be needed to change apps. Household does weekly supermarket runs (Asda/Tesco) and supplements with 1–2 online supermarket deliveries weekly. Campus activations and voucher drops were specifically cited as effective for Deliveroo. Cashback mechanics and group-order benefits increase repeat and group ordering.
